faqs.question: What types of flies are most common in Uniondale homes and businesses?
faqs.answer: Uniondale properties typically deal with house flies, fruit flies, drain flies, and blow flies. House flies are most common around garbage areas and food establishments, while fruit flies thrive in restaurants and kitchens. Drain flies breed in organic buildup within plumbing systems, and blow flies are attracted to decaying matter. Our technicians identify the specific species to implement the most effective control strategy for your Uniondale property.
